subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-09-18 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: Man, when he is content, is content with all things. When he is not content, even should he possess sovereignty, he remaineth unsatisfied [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انسان وقتی که راضی است بهر چیز راضی است.  وقتی که راضی نیست ولو بسلطنت هم باشد راضی
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
